_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Importantly, bipolar piloid cells expressed PDE4 in a peri-nuclear distribution characteristic of PDE4A1 localization (Figure 2D inset), suggesting a role for PDE4A1 expression in gliomagenesis.
details: Successfully detected PDE4A1 expression in bipolar piloid cells with peri-nuclear distribution characteristic of PDE4A1 localization
